pipeline_mode__provenance.reason: High-ambiguity strategic design task benefits from JIT prompt refinement — each phase's output should materially shape the next phase's framing (e.g., research findings must constrain brainstorm premises, and the winning brainstorm variant must drive spec structure).

enabled__provenance.reason: Composite complexity 4 (cross-cutting strategic scope, high ambiguity, high stakes). JIT refinement between phases 1->2, 2->3, and 3->4 is essential to keep brainstorm grounded in researched facts and spec grounded in the approved brainstorm variant.

INELIGIBLE — two independent disqualifications: (1) routing conflict (design task_type skip_profile includes Phase 6 per VALID_TARGETS, which is a statically ineligible condition per Section 2b of meta-analysis-prompt.md); (2) composite complexity 4 exceeds the <= 2 precondition. Either alone would force ineligibility.
Default replanning remains enabled for adaptive runs.

max_cycles__provenance.reason: Ambiguity score 5/5 — the business model space is open-ended by design. Allowing 2 replan cycles (instead of default 1) gives the brainstorm phase room to pivot once if the winning variant from Gate 3 diverges significantly from the research premise, without runaway cost.

divergence_threshold__provenance.reason: Default threshold is appropriate for strategic design work — no safety reason to lower.

trigger_classes__provenance.reason: Default trigger class set is appropriate.

confidence_threshold__provenance.reason: Default threshold acceptable; composite confidence 0.85 is well above it.

enabled__provenance.reason: Routing gate remains enabled; decision written to routing-decision.json.

confidence_threshold__provenance.reason: Default threshold; routing decision confidence 0.92 clears it.

auto_select_template__provenance.reason: Off per project config. No template auto-selected.

dimension_weights__provenance.reason: Phase 8 verification is SKIPPED for design task_type — weights are irrelevant for this run but kept at defaults in case the user later invokes /forge-execute on the roadmap, where defaults remain appropriate.

skip_phases__provenance.reason: Matches routing-decision.json skip_profile.skip_phases exactly. Design task — phases 0-4 produce the full deliverable.

approval_gates__provenance.reason: Gate 3 = brainstorm-winner approval (user chooses which business-model variant proceeds to spec) — this IS the critical human-in-the-loop decision for strategy work. Gate 4 = final spec approval before CEO presentation — the user must personally own the document they're walking into the executive meeting with. Default included Gate 6 (post-planning) which is moot here because Phase 6 is skipped.

mutation_threshold__provenance.reason: TDD phase is skipped; threshold irrelevant for this run.

enabled__provenance.reason: Oracle remains enabled to assist with JIT refinements and Phase 4 spec structural checks.
